title: Project Executive (HR Management)
description:
Job Overview:
We are seeking a detail-oriented Project Executive to support and oversee the delivery of task-based outsourcing and business process operations for multiple clients. The role involves coordinating daily operations, monitoring project performance, supporting workforce deployment, and ensuring accurate reporting, billing, and compliance.

Key Responsibilities:

1. Task-Based Outsourcing & Project Support

  • Oversee and manage daily operations of projects, ensuring tasks are completed on time and in line with client requirements.
  • Develop and implement operational policies, procedures, and best practices for projects.
  • Conduct performance evaluations and provide regular feedback to team members.
  • Coordinate work allocation and task scheduling for project staff.
  • Assist in staff onboarding and training to ensure role readiness and adherence to client requirements.
  • Monitor project performance, identify operational issues, and implement corrective actions.

2. Business Process Outsourcing (BPO) Support

  • Supervise administrative and operational tasks, ensuring timely and accurate execution.
  • Analyse existing processes and workflows to identify areas for improvement and implement solutions for efficiency and productivity.
  • Establish and enforce quality control standards to ensure services meet or exceed client expectations.
  • Implement corrective and preventive measures to address quality issues.

3. Workforce, Vendor & Talent Support

  • Conduct resource planning and assist with manpower deployment.
  • Support recruitment, selection, and onboarding of project staff.
  • Cultivate and maintain relationships with key vendors to secure timely and cost-effective delivery of services.
  • Drive initiatives to maintain employee engagement, satisfaction, and retention.

4. Compliance & Reporting

  • Ensure compliance with employment regulations, health, safety, and environmental standards.
  • Develop and maintain safety protocols, conduct training, and monitor adherence.
  • Prepare and analyse reports on KPIs to assess operational effectiveness and identify improvement opportunities.
  • Present findings and recommendations to senior management and key vendors.

Note: The above scope is subject to changes based on the needs of the company.

Requirements:

  • Diploma or degree in Business Administration, Human Resources, or related field.
  • At least 2 years’ experience in project coordination, business process outsourcing, or administrative support.
  • Strong organisational, communication, and problem-solving skills.
  • Excellent people and communication skills with strong work ethics and discipline.
  • Able to work in a fast-paced, SME environment
  • Detail-oriented with the ability to manage multiple tasks concurrently.
  • Proficiency in Microsoft Office
  • Possession of CEI/ knowledge of employment laws and guidelines advantageous.

postedCompany.description:
APBA TG Human Resource Pte Ltd

(a wholly owned subsidiary of the TG Group)


TG Group (“TG”) is a global workforce solutions provider with an international reach in over 50 markets across the globe. Headquartered in Singapore with Shanghai Foreign Service (Group) Co Ltd ("FSG") as a strategic shareholder, TG delivers a comprehensive suite of innovative human capital solutions to help our clients achieve greater business success.

TG adopts a future-centric approach where we aspire to be at the forefront of the evolution of the future of work. We believe that human capital is the greatest asset to any institution. With a wealth of experience in the Human Resources (HR) industry, we combine our international expertise and local know-how to deliver bespoke and innovative workforce solutions.

Our diverse portfolio of client-centric workforce solutions includes Contingent Workforce Management (CWM), Business Process Outsourcing (BPO), Permanent Placements, Recruitment Process Outsourcing (RPO), Professional Employer Organisation (PEO), and Payroll Process Outsourcing (PPO).
postedCompany.name: APBA TG HUMAN RESOURCE PTE. LTD.
